---
title: "Outro: Sharing and Publishing"
subtitle: "Workflows for dynamically generated reports"
author: "Fabio Molo and Gorka Fraga Gonzalez"
editor: visual
preview-links: true
listing: 
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle]
  type: table
  contents: 'slides'
  id: 'slides'
---

<iframe allowfullscreen class="pdf" src="Sharing_and_Publishing.pdf" width="100%" height="700px" style="border: 2px solid black;">

</iframe>

#### Go to online slides in full screen
